skill:pre-execute.description: Runs before a skill is executed. Receives skill name and input context.

skill:post-execute.description: Runs after a skill completes. Receives skill name, output, and duration.

skill:error.description: Runs when a skill execution fails. Receives skill name and error details.

pipeline:start.description: Runs when a multi-step pipeline begins. Receives pipeline name and step count.

pipeline:step-complete.description: Runs when a pipeline step completes. Receives pipeline name, step index, and step name.

pipeline:complete.description: Runs when all pipeline steps finish. Receives pipeline name and total duration.

pipeline:error.description: Runs when a pipeline fails at any step. Receives pipeline name, failed step, and error.

hubspot:logged.description: Runs after a successful HubSpot CRM write (deal created, note attached).
